differential_diagnoses: 5-Oxoprolinuria (pyroglutamic aciduria) secondary to chronic acetaminophen use and malnutrition
Acute-on-chronic heart failure leading to type A lactic acidosis
Diabetic ketoacidosis or hyperosmolar hyperglycemic state
next_steps: Order serum anion gap, serum lactate, and arterial blood gas analysis
Order a comprehensive metabolic panel including serum bicarbonate, creatinine, and glucose
Perform serum and urine 5-oxoproline testing (pyroglutamic acid) via organic acid analysis
Order an urgent head CT to rule out intracranial hemorrhage or acute stroke
Perform diagnostic lumbar puncture to rule out meningitis or encephalitis
Continue aggressive hemodynamic monitoring and optimization of perfusion
Review all medications for potential drug-drug interactions or toxic accumulation
Obtain arterial ammonia level to evaluate for hyperammonemic encephalopathy
